# BestSnowHotels

> The best ski-in/ski-out hotel directory worldwide, from the Alps to the Atlas to the Andes. 436 hand-picked ski destinations across 24 countries and 6 continents: France, Switzerland, Austria, Italy, Spain, Andorra, Germany (including the Bavarian Forest), Norway, Sweden, Finland, Japan, the United States, Morocco, Algeria, Lesotho, South Africa, Egypt (indoor), Canada, South Korea, Australia, New Zealand, Chile, Argentina and Bulgaria. Verified altitudes, snow data, piste detail and live hotel comparison via Stay22. Available in English, French, Spanish, Portuguese and Italian.

## What we cover

Each destination page lists:
- Real altitudes (base and summit, in metres)
- Total piste kilometres and lift count
- Piste breakdown by colour (green, blue, red, black runs)
- Season start and end dates
- Snow score (0-100) reflecting historical snow reliability
- Average snow depth by month, in cm
- A transparent ski-in/ski-out note (where ski-in/ski-out is genuine vs marketing)
- The types of skiing on offer (alpine, snowboard, freeride, snowpark, glacier, nordic, touring)
- Example well-rated hotels with distance to the slopes
- A live map of bookable hotels around the resort (Booking, Expedia, Hotels.com)
- Resort vibes (luxury, family, freeride, glacier, party, thermal, etc.)
- A data-driven FAQ

## How we score and classify (methodology)

/methodology explains, transparently, how we rate and classify the 436 resorts:
- The BestSnowHotels Snow Score (0 to 100): a comparative index of snow reliability combining base and summit altitude, the resort's historical snow record, and slope aspect. It is a way to compare resorts, not a live forecast.
- The ski-in/ski-out classification, three honest tiers against marketing: "ski to your door" (most of the village is on the snow), "ski-in/ski-out addresses" (only specific hotels or sectors), and stay-nearby (lodging in a town, you travel to the lifts).
- Sources: altitudes, piste km, lift counts and season windows are compiled and cross-checked; live snow comes from the Open-Meteo aggregated model; hotels are real listings with genuine ratings and honest distance to the slopes. We do not fabricate numbers or unverifiable dates.

## Ski areas (linked domains)

We also publish ski-area pages that group the resorts sharing one big linked domain, for travellers comparing where to base themselves:
- Les 3 Vallées (Val Thorens, Courchevel, Méribel, Les Menuires), 600 km
- Paradiski (Les Arcs, La Plagne), 425 km
- Espace Killy / Tignes-Val d'Isère (Tignes, Val d'Isère), 300 km
- Portes du Soleil (Avoriaz, Morzine, Les Gets, Châtel), around 600 km, France and Switzerland
- Évasion Mont-Blanc (Megève, Saint-Gervais, Combloux), 400 km
- Grand Massif (Flaine, Samoëns), 265 km
- Alpe d'Huez Grand Domaine (Alpe d'Huez, Vaujany), 250 km
- La Forêt Blanche (Vars, Risoul), 185 km
- Le Grand Domaine (Valmorel, Saint-François-Longchamp), 165 km
- Galibier-Thabor (Valloire, Valmeinier), 150 km
- Via Lattea / Milky Way (Montgenèvre, Sestriere), around 400 km, France and Italy
- Chamonix Mont-Blanc (Chamonix, Les Houches), 170 km
- Les Aravis (La Clusaz, Le Grand-Bornand), around 220 km
- Alp 2500 (La Molina, Masella), 140 km, Spain
- Formigal-Panticosa (Formigal, Panticosa), 216 km, Spain
- Vallnord (Pal-Arinsal, Ordino-Arcalís), around 93 km, Andorra
- Ski Arlberg (St. Anton, Lech-Zürs), 305 km, Austria

## Live snow report

A live snow + 7-day forecast section sits at /weather, refreshed every 30 minutes from the Open-Meteo aggregated model (ECMWF, MeteoFrance, DWD, Met Norway):

- /weather: index of all 436 resorts, sorted by current snow depth on the slopes, with quick links to the curated lists below
- /weather/[resort-slug]: per-resort snow report with live conditions, 7-day forecast, comparison to seasonal average and FAQ
- /weather/best-snow: top 24 resorts by deepest measured snow on the slopes today
- /weather/fresh-powder: top 24 resorts by most fresh snow over the last 24 hours and strongest snowfall forecast for the next week
- /weather/snowing-now: direct answer to "where is it snowing right now in the world", a live ranking of the resorts with the most fresh snow on the slopes this minute

## Ski season opening dates

- /opening-dates: resorts grouped by typical opening window (year-round glaciers, autumn glacier openers, October / November / December openers, spring + summer skiing, Southern Hemisphere June-October). Indicative windows from recent seasons, not confirmed 2026-2027 dates; each resort links to its official site to confirm.

## Ski-in/ski-out by country

Each resort is classified from our own editorial note into "ski to your door" (most of the village is genuinely on the snow) or "ski-in/ski-out addresses" (specific hotels or sectors only). Resorts where ski-in/ski-out is rare or shuttle-dependent are excluded, so listings are defensible rather than marketing. Counts below are qualifying resorts (genuine ski-to-door in brackets).

- /ski-in-ski-out: hub, 15 countries
- /ski-in-ski-out/france: 74 resorts (28 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/italy: 29 resorts (8 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/austria: 25 resorts (7 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/united-states: 26 resorts (8 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/switzerland: 20 resorts (3 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/south-korea: 10 resorts (2 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/spain: 9 resorts (6 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/sweden: 9 resorts (6 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/norway: 9 resorts (1 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/japan: 8 resorts (2 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/finland: 7 resorts (4 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/canada: 10 resorts (4 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/australia: 5 resorts (2 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/chile: 3 resorts (2 ski-to-door)
- /ski-in-ski-out/germany: 3 resorts

Index: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/ski-in-ski-out

## Resort guides: things to know before you go

Short, practical "things to know" briefings per resort: snow reliability, getting there and ski-in/ski-out access, ski-area size and level mix, the vibe, and when to go. Every point is generated from our own structured data (altitude, snow score, season window, piste mix, ski-in/ski-out classification), with no prices or specific dates we cannot verify. Built as question and answer, useful for direct answers and citations.

- /guides: hub, 10 flagship resorts
- /guides/val-thorens (France)
- /guides/chamonix (France)
- /guides/courchevel (France)
- /guides/val-d-isere (France)
- /guides/zermatt (Switzerland)
- /guides/verbier (Switzerland)
- /guides/st-moritz (Switzerland)
- /guides/st-anton (Austria)
- /guides/niseko (Japan)
- /guides/whistler-blackcomb (Canada)

Index: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/guides

## Thematic ski guides

Long-tail editorial guides built around one idea, with resorts or hotels chosen from our own data (no invented facts):
- /ski-guides/ski-spa-resorts: ski resorts with thermal spas and hot springs (Leukerbad, the Gastein valley, Bormio, Bad Kleinkirchheim, Serre Chevalier, Scuol...)
- /ski-guides/apres-ski-resorts: the best apres-ski and ski nightlife resorts (St. Anton, Ischgl, Val Thorens, Verbier, Solden, Saalbach...)
- /ski-guides/luxury-ski-hotels: the most luxurious, top-rated hotels in the great luxury ski resorts (Courchevel, Zermatt, St. Moritz, Verbier, Val d'Isere, Lech...)

Index: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/ski-guides

## Best-for lists (curated)

Curated lists for travellers shopping by intent rather than by name. Europe lists scope to the 11 European countries; Japan and USA each get their own.

Europe (Alps, Pyrenees, Scandinavia, Bavarian + Black Forest):
- Best snow-sure ski resorts in Europe: highest snow score (0-100), top altitudes
- Best family ski resorts in Europe
- Most luxurious ski resorts in Europe
- Best ski resorts with a glacier in Europe
- Biggest ski domains in Europe (linked piste km)
- Best value ski resorts in Europe
- Best resorts for freeride in Europe
- Best resorts for beginners in Europe
- Highest ski resorts in Europe (by village altitude)
- Car-free ski resorts in Europe
- Best ski resorts for freestyle and snowparks in Europe
- Best ski resorts near Geneva
- Best ski resorts near Lyon
- Best ski resorts near Munich
- Best ski resorts near Barcelona

Japan (Hokkaido + Honshu):
- Best ski resorts in Japan
- Best powder resorts in Japan (japow)

United States (Rockies, Wasatch, Sierra, Tetons, Cascades, East Coast):
- Best ski resorts in the United States
- Best powder ski resorts in the United States
- Best ski resorts in the Colorado Rockies
- Best ski resorts in the Utah Wasatch
- Best ski resorts on the US East Coast

Africa (Atlas, Djurdjura, Maluti, Drakensberg, indoor Cairo):
- Ski resorts in Africa

Canada (Coast Mountains, Rockies, BC Interior, Laurentides):
- Best ski resorts in Canada

South Korea (Taebaek Olympic cluster + Seoul day-trip + Southern Korea):
- Best ski resorts in South Korea

Oceania (Australian Alps + New Zealand Southern Alps):
- Best ski resorts in Australia
- Best ski resorts in New Zealand

South America (Chilean + Argentine Andes):
- Best ski resorts in Chile
- Best ski resorts in Argentina

Worldwide rankings:
- Highest ski resorts in the world (by summit altitude, all 24 countries: Breckenridge, Zermatt, Cervinia, Chamonix, Valle Nevado...)

Index: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/best

## Comparisons (head-to-head)

Side-by-side editorial comparisons with side-by-side stats and clear verdicts:
- /compare/zermatt-vs-st-moritz (Swiss luxury icons)
- /compare/whistler-blackcomb-vs-vail (North American giants)
- /compare/val-thorens-vs-tignes (French high-altitude rivals)
- /compare/niseko-vs-hakuba-happo-one (Japan: powder vs Olympic legacy)
- /compare/chamonix-vs-zermatt (Mont Blanc vs Matterhorn)
- /compare/aspen-snowmass-vs-vail (Colorado old-money rivals)
- /compare/val-d-isere-vs-tignes (Espace Killy duo: stone village vs purpose-built lake)
- /compare/courchevel-vs-meribel (Trois Vallées siblings)
- /compare/les-arcs-vs-la-plagne (Paradiski rivals)
- /compare/saalbach-vs-st-anton (Austria: Skicircus vs Arlberg birthplace)
- /compare/jackson-hole-vs-big-sky (US Northern Rockies expert duel)
- /compare/avoriaz-vs-morzine (Portes du Soleil: car-free high vs traditional town)
- /compare/les-menuires-vs-val-thorens (Three Valleys: value vs highest in Europe)
- /compare/alpe-d-huez-vs-les-deux-alpes (Oisans rivals: sunny domain vs glacier)
- /compare/verbier-vs-zermatt (Switzerland: freeride and party vs Matterhorn snow-sure)
- /compare/verbier-vs-courchevel (understated chalet luxury vs showcase luxury)
- /compare/st-anton-vs-lech-zurs (Arlberg: steep and wild vs discreet luxury)
- /compare/ischgl-vs-st-anton (Austria party legends: snow-sure cruising vs expert terrain)
- /compare/park-city-vs-deer-valley (adjacent Utah: vast and lively vs ski-only and groomed)
- /compare/park-city-vs-vail (biggest US area vs Colorado Back Bowls)
- /compare/breckenridge-vs-vail (high lively town vs bigger upscale Back Bowls)
- /compare/whistler-blackcomb-vs-lake-louise (vast coastal giant vs Banff Rockies scenery)

Travel-intent best-for lists (high search volume):
- /best/cheap-ski (budget Europe: Bansko, Borovets, Sierra Nevada, Andorra, Italian East)
- /best/ski-near-paris (TGV + drive: French Alps, Pyrenees)
- /best/ski-near-london (Geneva / Salzburg flight + drive, Japan)
- /best/spring-skiing (April + May glaciers and high-altitude)
- /best/ski-honeymoon (luxury romantic: St. Moritz, Gstaad, Aspen, Niseko)
- /best/apres-ski (nightlife and party: St. Anton, Ischgl, Val Thorens, Verbier, Whistler)
- /best/non-skiers (real towns, spas, scenic trains: Chamonix, Zermatt, St. Moritz, Queenstown)
- /best/snowboard (parks and powder: Laax, Avoriaz, Niseko, Whistler, Mayrhofen)
- /best/luxury-ski-in-ski-out-france (premium slope-side: Courchevel, Val d'Isere, Megeve, Meribel)
- /best/luxury-ski-in-ski-out-italy (premium slope-side: Cortina d'Ampezzo, Corvara, San Cassiano, Madonna di Campiglio)
- /best/family-ski-in-ski-out-france (ski to the door with kids: Les Arcs, La Plagne, Avoriaz, Flaine, Les Menuires)
- /best/family-ski-in-ski-out-austria (kids and slope-side: Serfaus-Fiss-Ladis, Saalbach, Wagrain, Obergurgl)

Index: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/compare

## Where to ski in 2027 (month-by-month)

Seasonal guides for the 2026-2027 season, each with curated resort picks:
- /when/december-2026 (pre-season + Christmas: high-altitude + glaciers)
- /when/january-2027 (midwinter coldest, best powder window)
- /when/february-2027 (peak crowds, half-term planning)
- /when/march-2027 (peak season, longer days)
- /when/april-2027 (spring skiing, high altitude only)
- /when/southern-hemisphere-winter-2027 (Australia + New Zealand + Lesotho + South Africa + Chile, Jun-Oct)

Index: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/when

## Winter holidays 2027 by ski domain

For travellers planning the 2026 to 2027 winter holidays around a big linked ski area: why each domain is worth a week (one lift pass, real piste km and lift count, top altitude, which member resorts to base in, and the indicative season window with the quieter alternatives to the Christmas and February peaks). Generated from our own data, no invented prices or confirmed dates. One page per ski area (42 domains), for example /winter-2027/les-3-vallees, /winter-2027/dolomiti-superski, /winter-2027/paradiski, /winter-2027/portes-du-soleil, /winter-2027/ski-arlberg.

Index: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/winter-2027

## Country coverage

- France (104): Val Thorens, Val d'Isère, Courchevel, Méribel, Chamonix, Les Arcs, La Plagne, Tignes, Alpe d'Huez, Serre Chevalier, Saint-Lary, Peyragudes, Font-Romeu, Grand Tourmalet, Cauterets, Les Menuires, Avoriaz, Morzine, Les Gets, Megève, La Clusaz, Les Deux Alpes, La Rosière, Flaine, Samoëns, Châtel, Valmorel, Montgenèvre, Les Saisies, Le Grand-Bornand, Sainte-Foy-Tarentaise, Val Cenis, Vaujany, Risoul, Vars, Pra-Loup, Isola 2000, Saint-Gervais, Ax 3 Domaines, Les Angles, Les Sybelles, Valloire, Orcières-Merlette, Les Orres, Auron, Les Contamines, Piau-Engaly, Luz-Ardiden, Gourette, Bonneval-sur-Arc, SuperDévoluy, Valberg, Chamrousse, Combloux, Valfréjus, La Pierre Saint-Martin, Guzet, Porté-Puymorens, Les 7 Laux, Villard-de-Lans, Saint-François-Longchamp, Aussois, Valmeinier, Arêches-Beaufort, La Norma, Les Houches, Luchon-Superbagnères, Formiguères, Val Louron, La Foux d'Allos, Crest-Voland-Cohennoz, Notre-Dame-de-Bellecombe, Praz-sur-Arly, Manigod, Praz-de-Lys Sommand, Saint-Pierre-de-Chartreuse, Saint-Martin-de-Belleville, Brides-les-Bains, Champagny-en-Vanoise, Peisey-Vallandry, Le Corbier, Bessans, La Chapelle d'Abondance, Saint-Sorlin-d'Arves, La Toussuire, Saint-Jean-d'Arves, Hauteluce, Pelvoux-Vallouise, Le Collet d'Allevard, Le Sauze-Super-Sauze, Le Mourtis, Ascou, Pralognan-la-Vanoise, Albiez-Montrond, Crévoux, Saint-Léger-les-Mélèzes, Aillons-Margériaz, Les Carroz, Morillon, Sixt-Fer-à-Cheval, Vallorcine, La Joue du Loup, Réallon, Saint-Honoré-1500
- Switzerland (46): Zermatt, Verbier, St. Moritz, Crans-Montana, Saas-Fee, Davos, Andermatt, Grindelwald, Wengen, Mürren, Engelberg, Laax, Arosa-Lenzerheide, Nendaz, Veysonnaz, Villars-Gryon, Les Diablerets, Adelboden, Gstaad, Champéry, Grimentz-Zinal, Anzère, Leysin, Klosters, Bettmeralp, Lenk, Hasliberg, Samnaun, Scuol, Sedrun, Savognin, Riederalp, Charmey, Splügen, Brigels, Pontresina, Klewenalp-Stockhütte, Tschiertschen, Wildhaus, Saint-Luc, Pizol, Saas-Almagell, Sankt Antönien, Sörenberg, Diemtigtal, Stoos
- Austria (53): St. Anton am Arlberg, Ischgl, Sölden, Mayrhofen, Kitzbühel, Saalbach Hinterglemm, Lech-Zürs, Obergurgl-Hochgurgl, Obertauern, Schladming, Bad Gastein, Bad Hofgastein, Zell am See, Kaprun, Hintertux, Serfaus-Fiss-Ladis, Nauders, Stubai Glacier, Kühtai, Söll, Alpbach, Fieberbrunn, Gerlos, Flachau, Damüls, Maria Alm, Lermoos, Filzmoos, Westendorf, Nassfeld, Galtür, Bad Kleinkirchheim, Hochfügen, Wagrain, Heiligenblut, Achenkirch, Ehrwald, Sankt Johann in Tirol, Brand, Mellau, Hopfgarten, Hochzeiger, Mölltaler Gletscher, See, Pertisau, Berwang, Leogang, Ellmau, Ramsau am Dachstein, Königsleiten, Stuben am Arlberg, Kappl, Krimml
- Italy (59): Cortina d'Ampezzo, Livigno, Cervinia, Madonna di Campiglio, Sestriere, Selva Val Gardena, Alta Badia, Canazei, Arabba, Ortisei, Bormio, La Thuile, Courmayeur, Sauze d'Oulx, Alagna, Champoluc, Gressoney, Kronplatz, San Martino di Castrozza, Pila, Passo Tonale, Folgarida-Marilleva, Ponte di Legno, Santa Caterina Valfurva, Madesimo, Bardonecchia, Pragelato, Andalo, Tarvisio, Chiesa in Valmalenco, Aprica, Pejo, Sappada, Limone Piemonte, Sella Nevea, Pampeago, Foppolo, Pinzolo, Folgaria, Cavalese, Predazzo, Falcade-San Pellegrino, Asiago, Piancavallo, Forni di Sopra, Schilpario, Cogne, Macugnaga, Carezza, Alleghe-Civetta, Marmolada-Malga Ciapela, Solda, Valtournenche, Corvara, San Cassiano, Castelrotto, Vigo di Fassa, Misurina, San Vito di Cadore
- Spain (13): Baqueira Beret, Formigal, Cerler, Candanchú, La Molina, Astún, Boí Taüll, Masella, Panticosa, Port Ainé, Espot, Vallter 2000, Port del Comte
- Andorra (3): Grandvalira, Vallnord-Pal Arinsal, Ordino-Arcalís
- Germany (19): Garmisch-Partenkirchen, Oberstdorf, Berchtesgaden, Sudelfeld, Spitzingsee, Brauneck-Lenggries, Reit im Winkl, Mittenwald, Oberammergau, Riedberg, Pfronten, Hindelang-Oberjoch, Feldberg, Wallberg-Tegernsee, Götschen-Bischofswiesen, Hochries-Samerberg, Ofterschwang, Inzell, Großer Arber
- Norway (13): Trysil, Hemsedal, Geilo, Hafjell, Voss, Kvitfjell, Oppdal, Beitostølen, Skeikampen, Stryn, Røldal, Narvik, Hovden
- Sweden (10): Åre, Sälen, Vemdalen, Idre Fjäll, Riksgränsen, Funäsdalen, Lofsdalen, Hemavan, Branäs, Tärnaby
- Finland (7): Levi, Ylläs, Ruka, Saariselkä, Pyhä-Luosto, Iso-Syöte, Salla
- Japan (12): Niseko, Rusutsu, Furano, Kiroro, Sapporo Teine, Tomamu (Hokkaido); Hakuba Happo-One, Hakuba Goryu & 47, Shiga Kogen, Nozawa Onsen, Myoko Akakura (Japanese Alps / Nagano-Niigata); Zao Onsen (Tohoku)
- United States (35, selected): Vail, Aspen Snowmass, Beaver Creek, Breckenridge, Keystone, Telluride, Steamboat, Crested Butte, Winter Park, Arapahoe Basin (Colorado Rockies); Park City, Deer Valley, Snowbird, Alta, Powder Mountain, Snowbasin (Wasatch / Utah); Mammoth Mountain, Palisades Tahoe, Heavenly, Northstar, Kirkwood (Sierra Nevada / California); Jackson Hole, Grand Targhee (Wyoming), Big Sky (Montana), Sun Valley (Idaho), Whitefish Mountain (Montana) (Northern Rockies); Crystal Mountain (Washington), Mt Bachelor (Oregon) (Cascades); Stowe, Killington, Stratton, Sugarbush (Green Mountains / Vermont); Sugarloaf (Maine); Taos Ski Valley (Sangre de Cristo / New Mexico)
- Morocco (4): Oukaïmeden (High Atlas, near Marrakech); Mischliffen, Jbel Habri, Jbel Bou Iblane (Middle Atlas)
- Algeria (3): Chréa (Atlas Blidéen, near Algiers); Tikjda, Tala-Guilef (Djurdjura, Kabylia)
- Lesotho (1): Afriski Mountain Resort (Maluti, highest ski base in Africa at 3050 m, southern-hemisphere season Jun-Aug)
- South Africa (1): Tiffindell (Eastern Cape Drakensberg, southern-hemisphere season Jun-Aug)
- Egypt (1): Ski Egypt (Mall of Egypt, Cairo, the only indoor ski slope in Africa, year-round)
- Canada (10): Whistler Blackcomb (Coast Mountains, BC); Banff Sunshine, Lake Louise, Marmot Basin (Canadian Rockies, Alberta); Revelstoke, Big White, Sun Peaks, Kicking Horse (BC Interior); Tremblant, Mont-Sainte-Anne (Laurentides, Quebec)
- South Korea (10): Yongpyong, High1, Phoenix Pyeongchang, Alpensia, Vivaldi Park, Welli Hilli Park (Taebaek Mountains / Gangwon Province, PyeongChang 2018 Olympic cluster); Konjiam, Oak Valley (Seoul Capital Area); Muju Deogyusan, Eden Valley (Sobaek Mountains / Southern Korea)
- Australia (5): Perisher, Thredbo (Snowy Mountains, NSW); Falls Creek, Mt Hotham, Mt Buller (Victorian Alps), Southern Hemisphere season Jun-Sep, snow gum eucalyptus forests
- New Zealand (5): Cardrona, Treble Cone (Wanaka); Coronet Peak, The Remarkables (Queenstown); Mt Hutt (Canterbury / Methven), Southern Hemisphere season Jun-Oct, no on-mountain lodging, you commute from lakeside towns
- Chile (3): Valle Nevado (Tres Valles, highest base in Chile at 3025 m), Portillo (1966 Alpine World Championships, Hotel Portillo on Laguna del Inca), La Parva (Tres Valles, residential club, Santiago day-trip), Andes range, Southern Hemisphere season Jun-Oct

## Languages

Site available in English (en), French (fr), Spanish (es), Portuguese (pt) and Italian (it). Every page has hreflang alternates for all five.

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en
- All destinations: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/destinations
- Ski areas (linked domains): https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/ski-areas
- Countries: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/countries
- Live snow report: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/weather
- Sitemap: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/sitemap.xml
